research_question: Do liquid A-shares with persistent higher close pivots and greater trading participation on advancing sessions earn positive cost-aware monthly active returns versus 510300.SH?
null_hypothesis: For both frozen variants and every gated split, population mean monthly net active return is less than or equal to zero.
economic_mechanism: Repeated higher highs and higher lows with participation concentrated on advancing sessions may reflect gradual capital accumulation and persistent price structure, rather than a large endpoint return or a fresh breakout.

primary_research_basis.title: Foundations of Technical Analysis: Computational Algorithms, Statistical Inference, and Empirical Implementation
primary_research_basis.authors: Andrew W. Lo; Harry Mamaysky; Jiang Wang
primary_research_basis.use: supports deterministic rather than subjective price-pattern definitions

primary_research_basis.title: Price Momentum and Trading Volume
primary_research_basis.authors: Charles M. C. Lee; Bhaskaran Swaminathan
primary_research_basis.use: supports freezing trading participation as an ex-ante conditioning dimension

lineage_separation.relative_strength_difference: No endpoint-return or benchmark-relative rank is used.
lineage_separation.family_46_difference: No 252-session price-to-high signal or overlapping six-month vintage is used.
lineage_separation.family_66_difference: No fresh-high breakout, low-volatility rank, volume-ratio threshold or 15-session event horizon is used.
lineage_separation.turnover_family_difference: Participation is a within-window confirmation share, not a low-turnover characteristic.

input_identity.snapshot_receipt_resolution: relative to the parent directory of the frozen database

supporting_table_resolution.a_share_symbol_master: latest ingested row per ts_code inside the exact whole-database SHA; nonempty source row identity and synthetic_data=false required
supporting_table_resolution.a_share_trade_calendar: all open-session rows through the cutoff inside the exact whole-database SHA; 64-hex row_hash and synthetic_data=false required

required_fields_and_units.benchmark_structural_limit_exception: 510300.SH may have null is_limit_up, is_limit_down, up_limit and down_limit only when the frozen receipt records the benchmark structural-null exception; all selected common-share panels require both raw statutory limits

universe.scope: SSE and SZSE domestic common A-shares on Main, STAR and ChiNext boards
universe.current_state: listed, non-ST, non-suspended, non-limit-up and non-limit-down at D
universe.missing_or_nonfinite_required_input: exclude before ranking; if fewer than 500 remain, invalidate the decision

feature_contract.input_window: exactly L accepted-session qfq_close and amount observations ending at D inclusive
feature_contract.completed_pivot_high: for interior index i, close[i] > close[i-1] and close[i] >= close[i+1]
feature_contract.completed_pivot_low: for interior index i, close[i] < close[i-1] and close[i] <= close[i+1]
feature_contract.minimum_pivots: at least two completed highs and two completed lows
feature_contract.higher_high: each newer high pivot is strictly greater than the preceding high pivot
feature_contract.higher_low: each newer low pivot is strictly greater than the preceding low pivot
feature_contract.up_participation_share: sum(amount[j] for transitions with close[j] > close[j-1]) / sum(amount[j] for all transitions j=1..L-1)
feature_contract.ranking: swing_persistence descending, up_participation_share descending, symbol ascending; no tie expansion

portfolio_and_execution.decision_frequency: last accepted session of each calendar month
portfolio_and_execution.benchmark: independently initialized investable 510300.SH with identical timing and costs
portfolio_and_execution.capacity: prior accepted session volume and amount caps, each 1 percent
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_entry: unfilled notional remains cash; no replacement
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_exit: retain and mark through the existing shared blocked-exit path
portfolio_and_execution.shared_semantics: reuse existing A-share T+1, limit, suspension, cost, corporate-action and cash accounting unchanged

costs.additional: existing 3 bps commission with CNY 5 minimum and dated statutory sell stamp tax

splits.access: closed until a later prospective phase

split_assignment: A monthly observation is retained only when entry and the next scheduled rebalance exit are inside the same split; crossing labels are purged and every split/variant starts in cash.

inference.resampling: circular block bootstrap over chronological non-overlapping monthly active returns
inference.seed_formula: 20260718 + 100 * variant_order + gated_split_order, where validation=1, holdout=2, forward=3
inference.p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / 10001
inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus the linearly interpolated 0.9916666666666667 quantile of centered bootstrap means
inference.annualized_net_return: for N chronologically aligned complete monthly returns r_t, product(1 + r_t) ** (12 / N) - 1; any nonfinite r_t, r_t <= -1, N=0, missing interval or nonpositive NAV fails the split

gates_per_variant_and_gated_split: zero invalid decisions, missing marks and accounting failures
mean monthly net active return is positive
one-sided Bonferroni p-value is at or below 0.008333333333333333
Bonferroni lower confidence bound is positive
strategy geometric annualized net return computed as product(1+r_t) ** (12/N) - 1 exceeds the identically aligned benchmark value
historical_pass: the same variant passes all six gates in validation and retrospective holdout
prospective_pass: the historically passing variant later passes all six gates in prospective forward without modification

outcome_free_preflight.pass_rule: every historical decision has at least 500 eligible and at least 15 candidates for both variants; all selected execution panels complete; benchmark fill true; unexpected exceptions zero
outcome_free_preflight.status_rule: PREFLIGHT_PASS only when every pass condition holds; STRUCTURAL_FAIL when a frozen eligible or candidate minimum fails; otherwise INPUT_BLOCKED

stop_rules: Any frozen decision below 500 eligible or 15 candidates closes the family at preflight; do not relax thresholds.
Do not alter pivots, participation threshold, windows, ranking, costs, timing, benchmark, splits, inference or gates after feature counts or outcomes are observed.
After preflight PASS, execute exactly one historical run with a fresh Run ID.
Historical FAIL closes permanently without retuning, rescue filter, regime relabel or rerun.
Historical PASS remains non-candidate and stops for full external review before prospective Shadow.
No embargo or prospective observation may be accessed in this phase.
